summary: immediate rebound HEAD is not persisted by onProgress checkpoint.
inspection_summary: reviewed final frozen-HEAD runtime contract including mutation boundary, restart persistence, Gate SSOT and typed stops.
judgment_delta: in-memory suffix rebinding passes, but authority checkpoint retains old current_head_sha until orchestration completion, so interruption cannot resume.

findings.detail: persist progress.current_head_sha in safe_action_checkpoint and prove it is visible before the next suffix runner.
